sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61749" key="laktistiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λακτ-ιστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n61749.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of kicking</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ λ.</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">kicking</tr_> in wrestling, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πυκτική</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Oenom.</author> </bibl> ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.34</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
